scripts.start: concurrently -n quote,shift -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w app-01-shop-quote-studio" "npm run start -w app-02-shift-stock-lite"
scripts.build: npm run build -w app-01-shop-quote-studio && npm run build -w app-02-shift-stock-lite
scripts.test: npm run test -w app-01-shop-quote-studio && npm run test -w app-02-shift-stock-lite && npm run test -w voice-chat
